scripts.preinstall: node -e "if (process.env.RAILWAY_ENVIRONMENT || process.env.CI || process.env.DOCKER_BUILD || process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.match(/pnpm|corepack/i)) process.exit(0); console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
